title: convolvulus alatus
intro: Convolvulus alatus, also known as the winged bindweed or winged morning glory, is a perennial plant species in the Convolvulaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. Convolvulus alatus is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, and has been used to treat conditions like fever, rheumatism, and skin issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
